justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's date and time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered the same unhelpful alternatives (earlier time, online meeting) despite the user's clear and repeated preference for an in-person afternoon meeting.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked the same questions and offered the same unhelpful alternatives, leading to a very long and unproductive conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and unhelpful suggestions, despite the user's clear preferences, made the conversation very frustrating and unproductive.

overall_notes: The agent failed to adapt its negotiation strategy despite the user's persistent refusal of the offered alternatives, leading to a very poor customer experience.
